title: Dense Thai Pork Skewers
description: Fatty, bouncy-qq pork skewers simmered in coconut cream and a spicy, fermented glaze for a street‑style bangkok flavor.
instructions: Peel and cube the pork into 4cm pieces.
Whisk coconut cream, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, grated ginger, minced lemongrass, turmeric, chili flakes, and salt until sugar dissolves.
Toss the pork cubes in the bowl to coat, then marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a large skillet over medium‑high heat and cook the marinated pork until browned on all sides, about 10 minutes.
Remove pork from skillet and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Thread the pork onto the soaked skewers, leaving space between each piece.
Grill the skewers over medium heat until cooked through and slightly charred, about 5 minutes per side.
Serve hot, optionally squeezing extra lime juice and sprinkling more chili flakes.
